title: Big Smoke as Piglins
description: Replaces Piglins with Big Smoke, includes voicelines
body:
This Resource Pack turns every Piglin in the game into Big Smoke.

Includes Big Smoke skin for Piglins, Brute Piglins and Zombified Piglins.

Includes Voice Lines.

(Might wanna lower your volume)

Requires [Optifine](https://optifine.net/home) or [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)/[ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)
